creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
OK, I should have an updated patch to upload soon.

Some info I collected on the various build options:

> ┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┯━━━━━━━━┯━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┯━━━━━━━━━━━━┓
> ┃ OPTIMISATION │ OPTION │ OTHER NOTES         │ SIZE       ┃    
> ┠──────────────┼────────┼─────────────────────┼────────────┃
> ┃ Debug        │ none   │                     │ 1030739776 ┃
> ┃ None         │ none   │                     │ 275110856  ┃
> ┃ Size         │ none   │                     │ 245282568  ┃
> ┃ Speed        │ none   │                     │ 282389808  ┃
> ┃ Speed        │ all    │                     │ 282896584  ┃
> ┃ Speed        │ all    │ without LDFLAGS=-s  │ 381968376  ┃
> ┗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┷━━━━━━━━┷━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┷━━━━━━━━━━━━┛

Results are just from a build directly on my host, not via poudriere.
